steps.text: Let me show you. I follow the top of each bar to see where it lands on the axis. Category A reaches 20. Category C reaches 40. Category D reaches 15. Category B reaches between 30 and 40, so that's 35. Category B is the answer.

steps.text: This one takes a bit of thought, so let's work through it together. I check where each bar ends. Category A ends at 20. Category C ends at 40. Category D ends at 15. Category B ends between 30 and 40, which is 35. The bars go sideways, but the axis still shows the same values. Category B is the answer.
